name: McLeod County Fairgrounds Commercial Building
description: McLeod County Fairgrounds Commercial Building is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hutchinson, MN. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available. Amenities include lights and restrooms.

name: Open Pickleball at Park Elementary
description: Open Pickleball at Park Elementary is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hutchinson, MN. There are 7 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Open Pickleball Recreation Center
description: Open Pickleball Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Hutchinson, MN. There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.
